title: Fast Local Feedback, Hooks, and Developer Experience
description: Create fast local gates that match CI without blocking ordinary iteration. Learners cumulatively produce a one-command local verification workflow through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Expose stable format, lint, type, test, and verify commands independent of tool internals.
Run fast deterministic changed-file checks in local hooks and keep heavier checks elsewhere.
Treat local hooks as convenience while CI remains authoritative and bypasses stay visible.
